gist.headline: Show off your stripes
gist.blurb: We've added a new public endpoint to show off your GitHub stats and Pollen tier without exposing the sensitive stuff. Time to see who the biggest flowers in the garden are!
gist.summary: Added a restricted public Tinybird endpoint for user data that safely exposes profile info and tiers while keeping sensitive details secure.
gist.impact: Developers can now build community leaderboards and profile cards using public user data without compromising privacy.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee pinning a cute, safe profile card to a community bulletin board, representing public user data being shared safely.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning a small pixelated profile card to a wooden community bulletin board. The card shows a tiny flower icon and a checkmark. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
